ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "overall_score" TEXT /* Overall score of the company based on various metrics */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "total_inbound_links" INTEGER /* Total number of inbound links */,
  "total_customer_count" INTEGER /* Total number of customers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the company's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Customer Count Score, Website Visits Score) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., traffic, customer, links) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum possible value for the metric */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum possible value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_metrics" (
  "company_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the company for the specific metric */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was calculated */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Actual value of the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., score, trend) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "share_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups to share the report with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Weight value assigned to the metric */,
  "weight_type" TEXT /* Type of the weight (e.g., fixed, dynamic) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the weight was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
